357.reason: [lookAhead(-1) may return null when curPos == 0, causing NullPointerException; also, error line should correspond to the last successfully parsed token's line, but lookAhead(-1) accesses tokens.get(curPos - 1), which might not be the correct location for certain errors like missing semicolon or bracket]
